creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
In ports from list below  I changed maintainer from ports@FreeBSD.org to me (magik@roorback.net). Also in four ports I added 'enlightenment' as virtual category.

I'm working on updates to recent version of these ports at https://github.com/MagikBSD/e17_ports and I have planned to finish patches in a week or two.
